name: Orzo with Spinach and Pine Nuts (Milliken & Feniger)
recipeIngredient: 2 large bunches spinach, stems removed and washed well
1/4 cup grated agedano or romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. In batches, add spinach with water clinging to the leaves. Stir for 2 minutes until wilted and tender.
3. Stir in a pinch of salt and pepper; drain in a colander set over a bowl.
4. When the spinach is cool enough to handle, press down to extract liquid. Coarsely chop, reserving juice.
5. Wipe out the pan. Add the remaining oil and heat over medium heat. Sauté pine nuts until lightly golden.
6. Add garlic and cook, stirring, about 2 minutes until aroma is released.
7. Stir in tomatoes and spinach; adjust seasonings and cook for an additional minute.
8. Remove from heat and set aside. Cook orzo according to package directions.
9. Drain the orzo and add to the spinach mixture with reserved spinach juice. Toss, reheat, sprinkle with cheese, and serve.
